overview: A visually rich, educational website about the Ancient Indian Bridge System. Features animated SVG structural diagrams, bridge type showcases, historical timelines, and notable bridges gallery — all presented in an authentic ancient Indian aesthetic with terracotta, saffron, gold, and ivory tones.
features: Animated hero section with ancient Indian aesthetic
Interactive animated SVG structural overview of bridge types
Bridge types showcase (Rope, Stone Arch, Timber, Pontoon, Chain)
Animated historical timeline from Ramayana to Fa Hien
Notable ancient bridges gallery across India
Stone texture backgrounds and scroll-triggered animations
Fully responsive layout for mobile, tablet, and desktop
